state: # Census 2011 boundary-adjusted populations for post-2011 carve-out districts
# This file is the lookup for post-2011 boundary populations that don't
# come directly from census_2011_districts.csv. Each row has a source URL. To change a value
#   state                    : MPI/current state name (matches scripts/csr/rebuild_data.py STATE_CODES)
#   district                 : MPI/current district name (lower-case OK; pipeline normalises)
#   population_2011_recast   : 2011 population WITHIN the district's CURRENT boundary (integer)
#   parent_districts         : comma-separated list of Census 2011 parent district(s); blank for residuals
#                              (blank for single-parent or residual rows). Sum must equal population_2011_recast.
#     gazette_2011_table        2011 figure published in state gazette / district website (citable)
#     subdistrict_sum           sum of constituent tehsils/mandals from Census 2011 PCA
#     areal_allocation          parent's pop apportioned by current district area or parent-pop share
#     census_exact_rename       Census 2011 has the district under an older name (no boundary change)
#   source_url               : URL the value can be verified against (Wikipedia
#   fetched_on               : ISO date the URL was fetched and value transcribed
# All values verified against per-parent invariant: sum of(children + residual) ≈ parent_census_2011 ±0.5%.

source_doc: Wikipedia citing Census of India DCHB Thane (DH_2011_2721_PART_A_DCHB_THANE.pdf) - sum of talukas now comprising the district
